1. 2. [Anthropic Economic Index: AI’s Impact on Software Development](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=273ed97dcddae63fb0fa954be9617ce9c9045e2e383ea739ce59ba25dd84a997&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90542&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=b2a44b5c766a86ca64c365ab58f9833d&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW50aHJvcGljLmNvbS9yZXNlYXJjaC9pbXBhY3Qtc29mdHdhcmUtZGV2ZWxvcG1lbnQ&email_id=d7354d7333c33d4e02a637a79921e2cc).
3. For this summer: "This month-long "popup village" is a prototype for [Esmeralda](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=13a4633e0da9fdcdcdeacacf36aff44668338b05cbaec88414d85d74d3e1200b&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90542&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=11f0b68fc8847ebabddaf1bd10363fc5&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d7354d7333c33d4e02a637a79921e2cc), the permanent town they are building 90 minutes north of SF. [Edge Esmeralda](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f2b50bb86a301e743915f548001a570176a6f99fa235be34a4535cec38e79125&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90542&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=a69838b6b35a1f8eb0ee9a73d4bcb655&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d7354d7333c33d4e02a637a79921e2cc) runs May 24 - June 21 in Healdsburg, just 15 mins from the land they are buying."
5.
